compiled_state.title: Update downstream consumers for onboarding and architect-foundation renames
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update all script-level and config-level consumers that reference old skill names to use new names.

### Files to update (from story description):
1. check-onboarding.sh — search .claude/design-notes.md, reference new skill names
2. validate-review-output.sh — add architect-foundation as valid caller
3. test-sub-agent-guard.sh — tests already updated (done in earlier batches)
4. evals.json — update skill existence assertions if present
5. dso-setup.sh — update post-install message
6. .test-index — clean up stale entries pointing to deleted test files

### Also clean up:
- Remove stale .test-index entries for deleted test files (test_project_setup_skill_conditional_prompts.py, test_project_setup_suite_placement.py, test-project-setup-ci-generation.sh)
- Update any remaining old skill name references in scripts

### TDD: Unit test exemption
Criteria 1: No conditional logic — pure string replacements. Criteria 2: Tests would be change-detectors. Criteria 3: Infrastructure-boundary-only (config wiring).

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-onboarding.sh (modify)
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh (modify)
- plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh (modify if references old names)
- .test-index (modify — clean stale entries)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] check-onboarding.sh references new skill names
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding' plugins/dso/scripts/check-onboarding.sh
- [ ] No stale .test-index entries
  Verify: ! python3 -c "import os; [print(l.strip()) for l in open('.test-index') if any(f.strip() and not os.path.exists(f.strip()) for f in l.split(':')[1].split(',') if f.strip() and not f.strip().startswith('['))]" 2>/dev/null | head -1
- [ ] check-skill-refs.sh passes
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-skill-refs.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket reviewed. Task is to update downstream consumers for skill renames (design-onboarding → onboarding, dev-onboarding → architect-foundation). Files: check-onboarding.sh, validate-review-output.sh, .test-index, dso-setup.sh.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read. Summary: (1) check-onboarding.sh has /dso:design-onboarding and /dso:dev-onboarding references in comments and JSON output. (2) validate-review-output.sh has dev-onboarding in 7 locations (comment header, hash var declaration, usage(), --list-callers, CALLER_SCHEMA dict key, case statement). Need to add architect-foundation in parallel. (3) .test-index - stale entries already absent (must have been cleaned earlier). (4) dso-setup.sh has no skill name references to update.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: No RED tests needed - unit test exemption applies per story spec: pure string replacements, no conditional logic.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: All updates made. check-onboarding.sh: updated /dso:design-onboarding → /dso:onboarding and /dso:dev-onboarding → /dso:architect-foundation in 4 locations (header comments, JSON skill keys, text output). validate-review-output.sh: added architect-foundation as valid caller alongside dev-onboarding in 7 locations (header comment, hash var, usage(), --list-callers, caller validation case, CALLER_SCHEMA dict, CALLER_HASH case). .test-index: no stale entries found (already clean). dso-setup.sh: no skill name references to update.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validations passed. check-skill-refs.sh: no files to scan (pass). test-sub-agent-guard.sh: PASSED 40, FAILED 0.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. All changes verified correct. check-onboarding.sh: 6 locations updated (header comment x2, JSON skill keys x2, text output x2) — no old skill names remain. validate-review-output.sh: architect-foundation added alongside dev-onboarding in 7 locations — hash reuses 9ec70789c77bcca2 (same schema). .test-index: stale entries already absent. dso-setup.sh: no changes needed. Both validation scripts pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Updated check-onboarding.sh, validate-review-output.sh (with architect-foundation caller + tests), roadmap/SKILL.md JSON keys, onboarding/SKILL.md stale refs
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
